name: Curses Found Family
description:
𖹭 in dagon's domain w/ the curses

includes: Kenjaku, Hanami, Mahito, Dagon, Jogo, Choso, and Junpei

haring this in hopes it can be used to fulfill each and every one of our fantasies to be included with these cool guys

(we can say that junpei's life was spared in this timeline and he got to meet choso, eso, and kechizu)

i don't mind constructive criticism and i love feedback so don't be shy to let me hear all of your thoughts and experiences

ive created an open ended scenario for each and every one of the characters in the introduction, so just respond by inserting your character :3 thanks so much hope someone was waiting for an evil gang bot

❤️
